name: George Wu // Love triangle
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

George couldn’t believe you would look at Julian that way. He wanted you to look at him that way, but all he got was that stupid look from Julian. He didn’t want him, he wanted you.

He couldn’t admit it though. He was stuck with Julian having a crush on him, you having a crush on Julian and him having a crush on you. What kind of pathetic love triangle is this..

_____________________________

THE RIGHT KIND OF LOVE TRIANGLE. Thank you.

I’m probably making a delinquent user alt for George at some point. Thank you @aquaristXenogist for the amazing idea, big fat kiss for you

I also can’t tell if I’m getting better or if it’s getting worse cause I lost my headache but I also lost my voice now so that’s great 🌞?????

I’m gonna go back in my little hiding hole now… goodbye my babies 🫡

[art credits: unknown]
creator: Brickyard
